title: Snowify: Eternal Snow
description: This mod turns all rain into snow and gives every plant a snowy, white appearance. Enjoy a constant winter atmosphere in any biome!
body:
**❄️ SNOWIFY : ETERNAL SNOW ❄️**

This mod turns all rain into snow and gives every plant a snowy, white appearance. Enjoy a constant winter atmosphere in any biome!

**What it does:**

- Rain? Nah, it’s snow all the time ⛄
- Snow can fall even in biomes that normally never see it
- All plants get a snowy upgrade 🌿➡️❄️
- Client-side only, so you can use it on any server without issues
  
**Have Fun!**
